_comment_1: Phase-8 Session 4 (G2): regime → allowed strategy list. Calibrated 2026-04-22 (Audit-O+P) by signal-family affinity: momentum/trend families ship in trending regimes; mean-reversion in ranging; volatility+momentum+trend in volatile (markets with ADX>=25 AND high vol_pct are trending-volatile, not chop); adverse silences everything. Strategy identifiers match chad.types.StrategyName values.
_comment_2: Unknown regime keys fall through to the 'unknown' bucket. An empty list for a regime silences ALL strategies under that regime (used only for 'adverse').
_comment_3: Consumed by chad.portfolio.regime_activation.filter_intents_by_regime(...) — wired in chad.core.live_loop after _build_plan_and_intents so the matrix actually gates routed intents on both IBKR and Kraken lanes.
_comment_4: 2026-04-22 Audit-O+P: volatile expanded to the full trending-family + vol-family set. CHAD's live classifier flags 'volatile' when realized_vol_percentile is high, but ADX=36 in current tape means the market is trending-volatile (directional). Silencing alpha/beta/gamma under those conditions starves the book. Restored: alpha, beta, gamma, alpha_crypto, alpha_intraday, alpha_options, alpha_forex alongside the existing futures/vol strategies.
